resources.name: Hyperliquid
resources.description_short: Onchain perpetual futures and spot DEX running on its own L1 with an HyperEVM smart-contract layer.

resources.name: Coinbase AgentKit
resources.description_short: Coinbase's toolkit for giving AI agents wallets and the ability to take onchain actions.

resources.name: ElizaOS
resources.description_short: Open-source TypeScript framework for building crypto-native multi-agent systems.

resources.name: Jupiter
resources.description_short: Solana swap aggregator that routes trades across DEXs via a widely used API and SDKs.

resources.name: Model Context Protocol (MCP)

resources.name: Virtuals Protocol
resources.description_short: Launchpad and protocol for creating and tokenizing AI agents, primarily on Base.

resources.name: GOAT SDK
resources.description_short: Crossmint's open-source library of onchain actions (tools) for AI agents across chains.

resources.name: 1inch

resources.name: Solana Agent Kit

resources.name: Olas (Autonolas)

resources.name: dYdX

resources.name: Uniswap

resources.name: x402

resources.name: Zerion

resources.name: Agent Payments Protocol (AP2)

resources.name: OpenClaw

resources.name: Bankr

resources.name: Claude Code
resources.description_short: Anthropic's agentic command-line coding tool that runs agents and loads Agent Skills, including onchain skills.

resources.name: DefiLlama

resources.name: Privy

resources.name: GMX

agents.name: SatoBot
agents.description: The agent Sato OS runs in production: executes funded errands on Base under ERC-7715 session grants, registers its own ERC-8004 identity, and publishes verified executions to an EAS attestation ledger.
